lines.english: Lesson 3
lines.chinese: 第3课
lines.raw: Lesson 3 | 第3课

lines.english: An unknown goddess
lines.chinese: 一个不知名的女神
lines.raw: An unknown goddess | 一个不知名的女神

lines.english: How did the archaeologists know that the statue was a goddess?
lines.chinese: 考古学家怎么知道这座雕像是女神？
lines.raw: How did the archaeologists know that the statue was a goddess? | 考古学家怎么知道这座雕像是女神？

lines.english: Some time ago, an interesting discovery was made by archaeologists on the Aegean island of Kea.
lines.chinese: 不久前，考古学家在爱琴海的凯阿岛上有一项有趣的发现。
lines.raw: Some time ago, an interesting discovery was made by archaeologists on the Aegean island of Kea. | 不久前，考古学家在爱琴海的凯阿岛上有一项有趣的发现。

lines.english: An American team explored a temple which stands in an ancient city on the promontory of Ayia Irini.
lines.chinese: 一个美国小组考察了在阿伊亚伊里尼海角的一座古城中的一座神庙。
lines.raw: An American team explored a temple which stands in an ancient city on the promontory of Ayia Irini. | 一个美国小组考察了在阿伊亚伊里尼海角的一座古城中的一座神庙。

lines.english: The city at one time must have been prosperous, for it enjoyed a high level of civilization.
lines.chinese: 这座城市曾一度繁荣，因为它享有高度的文明。
lines.raw: The city at one time must have been prosperous, for it enjoyed a high level of civilization. | 这座城市曾一度繁荣，因为它享有高度的文明。

lines.english: Houses -- often three storeys high -- were built of stone.
lines.chinese: 房屋——通常有三层楼高——是用石头建造的。
lines.raw: Houses -- often three storeys high -- were built of stone. | 房屋——通常有三层楼高——是用石头建造的。

lines.english: They had large rooms with beautifully decorated walls.
lines.chinese: 它们有大房间，墙壁装饰精美。
lines.raw: They had large rooms with beautifully decorated walls. | 它们有大房间，墙壁装饰精美。

lines.english: The city was even equipped with a drainage system, for a great many clay pipes were found beneath the narrow streets.
lines.chinese: 这座城市甚至配备了排水系统，因为在狭窄的街道下发现了大量的陶土管道。
lines.raw: The city was even equipped with a drainage system, for a great many clay pipes were found beneath the narrow streets. | 这座城市甚至配备了排水系统，因为在狭窄的街道下发现了大量的陶土管道。

lines.english: The temple which the archaeologists explored was used as a place of worship from the fifteenth century B.C. until Roman times.
lines.chinese: 考古学家考察的神庙从公元前15世纪一直到罗马时代都被用作礼拜场所。
lines.raw: The temple which the archaeologists explored was used as a place of worship from the fifteenth century B.C. until Roman times. | 考古学家考察的神庙从公元前15世纪一直到罗马时代都被用作礼拜场所。

lines.english: In the most sacred room of the temple, clay fragments of fifteen statues were found.
lines.chinese: 在神庙最神圣的房间里，发现了15尊雕像的陶土碎片。
lines.raw: In the most sacred room of the temple, clay fragments of fifteen statues were found. | 在神庙最神圣的房间里，发现了15尊雕像的陶土碎片。

lines.english: Each of these represented a goddess and had, at one time, been painted.
lines.chinese: 每一尊都代表一位女神，并且曾被涂上颜色。
lines.raw: Each of these represented a goddess and had, at one time, been painted. | 每一尊都代表一位女神，并且曾被涂上颜色。

lines.english: The body of one statue was found among remains dating from the 15th century B.C.
lines.chinese: 一尊雕像的身体是在可追溯到公元前15世纪的遗迹中发现的。
lines.raw: The body of one statue was found among remains dating from the 15th century B.C. | 一尊雕像的身体是在可追溯到公元前15世纪的遗迹中发现的。

lines.english: Its missing head happened to be among remains of the fifth century B.C.
lines.chinese: 它缺失的头部碰巧在公元前5世纪的遗迹中。
lines.raw: Its missing head happened to be among remains of the fifth century B.C. | 它缺失的头部碰巧在公元前5世纪的遗迹中。

lines.english: This head must have been found in Classical times and carefully preserved.
lines.chinese: 这个头部一定是在古典时期被发现并精心保存下来的。
lines.raw: This head must have been found in Classical times and carefully preserved. | 这个头部一定是在古典时期被发现并精心保存下来的。

lines.english: It was very old and precious even then.
lines.chinese: 即使在当时，它也非常古老而珍贵。
lines.raw: It was very old and precious even then. | 即使在当时，它也非常古老而珍贵。

lines.english: When the archaeologists reconstructed the fragments, they were amazed to find that the goddess turned out to be a very modern-looking woman.
lines.chinese: 当考古学家重组这些碎片时，他们惊讶地发现这位女神竟然是一个看起来非常现代的女人。
lines.raw: When the archaeologists reconstructed the fragments, they were amazed to find that the goddess turned out to be a very modern-looking woman. | 当考古学家重组这些碎片时，他们惊讶地发现这位女神竟然是一个看起来非常现代的女人。

lines.english: She stood three feet high and her hands rested on her hips.
lines.chinese: 她身高三英尺，双手叉腰。
lines.raw: She stood three feet high and her hands rested on her hips. | 她身高三英尺，双手叉腰。

lines.english: She was wearing a full-length skirt which swept the ground.
lines.chinese: 她穿着一件拖地的长裙。
lines.raw: She was wearing a full-length skirt which swept the ground. | 她穿着一件拖地的长裙。

lines.english: Despite her great age, she was very graceful indeed, but, so far, the archaeologists have been unable to discover her identity.
lines.chinese: 尽管她年代久远，但确实非常优雅，不过到目前为止，考古学家们还未能发现她的身份。
lines.raw: Despite her great age, she was very graceful indeed, but, so far, the archaeologists have been unable to discover her identity. | 尽管她年代久远，但确实非常优雅，不过到目前为止，考古学家们还未能发现她的身份。
